summary:
Adam reported the Diligent categorization agent flow is built and working well using GPT-4o Mini, processing ~20K tokens per request. He noticed his LangFuse wasn't working and checked costs. Brad confirmed Max is aligned on sunsetting Flowwise and pivoting away from drag-and-drop node builders. Adam's primary use of Flowwise was piggybacking on API keys and tracking via LangFuse, not the chat interface itself.

Brad raised concerns about timezone coverage gaps - by the time Max and Diego start work, it's already 2PM their time, leaving no support during US morning working hours. This becomes more critical if SBI Builders closes. They discussed financials: Diligent is the primary revenue source with ~$300K outstanding, IAS is in discussions, and costs need to be managed as SBI Builders closes.

IAS updates: waiting on Rahila's final approval for search rollout to whitelist users. Susan continues to be indecisive. IAS is also discussing a new project for next week and evaluating CMS alternatives to Contentful (Salesforce Knowledge Base mentioned internally), though they just re-signed with Contentful. Adam noted Contentful's localization is best-in-class, and Jamie has a ticket for Sanity field-level localization plugin research. Adam also wants Jamie to research simplifying the Sanity-to-Contentful content normalization layer.

Brad showed Mobbin.com for design inspiration, and they discussed Last Rev website priorities: customer stories, services pages, homepage video with AI assessment CTA. Brad made significant Alpha Agent updates over the weekend including full task lifecycle, work tree workflow, and 13,000+ tests (11K unit, 1.2K API, 100 E2E). Adam tried running the latest version but hit database migration/node version compatibility issues.
keyDiscussionPoints: Diligent categorization agent flow built and working with GPT-4o Mini
Timezone coverage gap - no US morning support from AnswerAgent team
Financials: Diligent primary revenue, ~$300K outstanding invoices
IAS search rollout waiting on Rahila approval, new project upcoming
IAS evaluating CMS alternatives to Contentful
Alpha Agent: 13,000+ tests, full task lifecycle, work tree workflow
Alpha Agent database migration issues on Adam's machine
Last Rev website priorities: customer stories, services, video, AI assessment
decisions: All three founders agree Flowwise needs to be sunset
Push clients toward recurring support contracts
Diligent categorization uses direct API (not Flowwise)
Jamie to research Sanity normalization simplification and field-level localization

actionItems.action: Get IAS search rollout approved by Rahila
Create ticket for Jamie to research simplifying Sanity-Contentful normalization
Fix Alpha Agent database migration/node version compatibility
Get Last Rev website customer stories written
Send out Lively invoice (check if recurring is set up)
Address timezone coverage gap for AnswerAgent support

followUp: IAS new project discussion next week
Alpha Agent migration fix for Adam
jiraNote: JIRA credentials not configured - unable to search for related tickets
